extra.reason: Answered: BFF makes backend CORS config unnecessary for normal operation (same-origin); backend CORS is a hardcoded regex, not env — env only sets the server-side BACKEND_API_URL. See notes + DL11 D1 / T06.

Backend vendored from local source (core/ static copy, no git/clone/submodule); VERSION=0.1.0 seed; serve.py _get_app_version adapted per DL11 D2 (APP_VERSION env then /app/VERSION then v0.0.0-unknown); docker/Dockerfile.backend from local source, context=repo root, non-root uid1000, --workers 1. Verified: pytest 334 passed, ruff clean, docker build OK, /health appVersion==0.1.0, empty-env file-fallback proven, no git in image. prototype/leave_daystate_160h.yaml vendored (byte-identical, git-tracked sibling of core/ in old repo) to keep shipped suite green — ratified.

T02 complete + cold-reviewed clean. web/ Next 16 App Router (standalone, TS strict, React 19, Tailwind v4, shadcn+Base UI init), oxlint/oxfmt/lefthook/vitest/Playwright toolchain. Dockerfile.web (multi-stage standalone, NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_VERSION baked pre-build, non-root), compose.yml (backend host-unbound+health-gated, web only-published, cloudflared TUNNEL_TOKEN env origin->web:3000), Makefile build-wrapper (fail-loud on missing VERSION, build decoupled from runtime env), /api/health passthrough. Cold review (codex/gpt-5.6-sol): 8 findings all resolved+confirmed — make/runtime decoupling, real verify-deploy.sh gates, beads-hook fail-closed, /api/health URL-leak fixed, lean-prod image (selective COPY nurse_scheduling only), pnpm start standalone, T03 token fences, runbook nit. Gates: host pytest 334, verify-deploy 9/9, frontend lint/type/test/e2e green. Uncommitted (conservative). beads-hook append ratified (survives bd hooks install byte-for-byte).

T18 scenario contract core — cold-reviewed clean over 3 fix rounds. Pure zero-dep TS: shared domain types (C1 mirror of NurseSchedulingData, 7 preference unions, export rule union, HoursContractMetadata), toCanonicalScenarioDocument projection, canonicalHash (order-independent, bareword-encoded non-finite), keyless ImportNormalizationTarget. Review found 4M+2m+1N (C1-fidelity: contracted-hours discriminated union, keyless import target, kind-authority request cells, numeric export selectors, hash tag alias, exhaustive type fixtures) — all resolved+confirmed. Reserved-selector: ALL allowed (worked-day request per preference_types.py:238-246), direct OFF/LEAVE rejected in projection; group-expansion-to-reserved deferred to T05 producer validation (recorded in T05 ticket). 30 vitest pass, full typecheck exit 0. Uncommitted (conservative).

T03 design-system/token port — cold-reviewed clean (2 review rounds). README tokens → Tailwind v4 @theme + CSS vars (light+dark, radius 0, fluid type, spacing, motion, density multiplier, 480-1920 ladder); fonts Figtree(display)/Hanken Grotesk(body)/Spline Sans Mono(mono); react-icons fa6 + lucide-import guard; restyled shadcn/Base + shimmer skeletons; class-based light/dark+density theme; living style page. Review found 4M (hydration mismatch, incomplete token port, WCAG contrast, weak acceptance tests) + a latent shared-cn tailwind-merge bug — all resolved+confirmed. Hydration via useSyncExternalStore (stable server snapshot + post-mount adoption, no write-back); shell tokens + accent axis + color-mix brand derivation added; WCAG per user decision 'fix functional text only' (--error-strong 5.44:1, status badges ink-on-tint + redundant border/icon, ink3/faint kept muted by design); skeleton reuses real Card primitives (both-dim assert); sentinel-proven console guard; cn extendTailwindMerge in lib/utils.ts. 156 vitest + 11/11 playwright, typecheck 0. Uncommitted (conservative).

T06 BFF/API boundary — cold-reviewed clean (2 review rounds). Same-origin Next proxy for C2 surface: POST /api/optimize (multipart duplex:half, exact 413), GET /{id} poll, GET /{id}/events (fetch-stream SSE verbatim passthrough + upstream abort-cancel), GET /{id}/xlsx, POST /{id}/heartbeat, POST /{id}/cancel (faithful mirror, no cleanup-DELETE). Cookie: only nurse_scheduling_client_uuid, Secure from PUBLIC_ORIGIN. Endpoint-aware 404 classifier (expired/no-result/unknown). Ordinal-skip replay dedupe. TanStack Query hooks (submit/poll/xlsx/cancel/heartbeat@5s). Config fail-fast via instrumentation.ts process.exit(1). Review found 3M+2m (blanket-404, no startup fail-fast, silent SSE death, heartbeat+transport test gaps) — all resolved+confirmed by execution incl. real node:http transport + subprocess boot test. 158 vitest + typecheck 0 + build OK. Uncommitted (conservative).
